recommendation.summary: This week is almost entirely body maintenance (medical, gym, yoga, logistics) plus one strong job push — zero social hours, zero culture. With Thursday comedy (Cheaper Than Therapy) and Friday dance (Dance Fridays) both on the calendar, pick one. The bigger gap is social: text someone you've been meaning to see and make a concrete plan before the week ends.

suggested.title: Dance Fridays — Salsa & Bachata, Fri Jun 19
Women in Tech SF 2026 — Thu Jun 25
